title: Require Service Contract Schemas
forbids: a module contract outside its directly exported operation object or an input/output outside the canonical @rawr/hq-sdk schema bridge
why: The operation object keeps module capability declaration visible, and the canonical bridge plus TypeScript preserves TypeBox authority without a schema-library deny-list or a second validator.
remediate: Export contract directly as an operation object, optionally typed or asserted as const. Adapt each TypeBox value inline with schema from @rawr/hq-sdk, or pass a top-level same-file const whose bare initializer is that bridge call.
message: Service contracts must directly expose their operation object and use the canonical TypeBox schema bridge.
